name: MYOB AccountRight Accounting Data Export
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can export retail transaction data from "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " in formats compatible with MYOB AccountRight desktop software, enabling integration with this popular Australian accounting platform even without real-time connectivity. This helps optimize your accounting workflows by providing structured data exports that can be imported into MYOB AccountRight, reducing manual data entry while working with desktop accounting software."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Exporting data for MYOB AccountRight involves generating formatted files containing sales, purchases, and other financial transactions that conform to MYOB's import requirements. When you use accounting data export properly, you can expect significantly reduced manual accounting entry, consistent data formatting supporting reliable imports, maintained financial accuracy through structured data transfer, time savings for accounting processes, and flexibility to synchronize accounting on your preferred schedule."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Version Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": The Accounting Data Export feature exports MYOB files formatted for direct upload to MYOB Desktop v19+ and MYOB AccountRight 2018+."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Accounting Data Export window provides access to the setup files for the integration as well as the data files that contain the information from a date range."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": summary per purchase order. Once received, a purchase will be created with total costs for items, miscellaneous costs and freight. Any duty applied to purchase orders will be in the GeneralJournal file"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Transfers"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Inter-store transfers are included in the "}, {"text": "GeneralJournal", "bold": true}, {"text": " file."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Transfers between stores will run through an ?In Transit? account on the date of dispatch at the sending store and the date of receipt at the receiving store"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stock Adjustments"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Included in the "}, {"text": "GeneralJournal", "bold": true}, {"text": " file, consists of the buy price value for all adjustments including manual, stock take and mass upload. Cost adjustments will result in adjustments to correct stock value"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Cash Variances"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Included in the "}, {"text": "GeneralJournal", "bold": true}, {"text": " file, journaled as a daily total to an expensing account"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Petty Cash/Money In Money Out"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Included in the "}, {"text": "GeneralJournal", "bold": true}, {"text": " file, journaled as a daily total to a clearing account for expensing"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-10b152b5"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Extract the Export Files"}], "data-id": "extract-the-export-files"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express exports the files in a compressed format so the file is smaller and faster to download.
